ee:transform.doc:name: Load synthetic OMH + build FHIR Bundle

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { resourceType: "Bundle", 'type': "searchset", meta: { lastUpdated: now() as String, source: "urn:pause-health:mulesoft:pause-patient-bundle-process-api", tag: [{ system: "urn:pause-health:tag", code: "omh-transformed", display: "Built via DataWeave OMH->FHIR transform" }] }, entry: [ { fullUrl: "urn:uuid:pause-demo-patient-001", resource: { resourceType: "Patient", id: "pause-demo-patient-001", meta: { profile: ["http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient"] }, identifier: [{ system: "urn:pause-health:demo-cohort", value: "pause-demo-patient-001" }], active: true, gender: "female", birthDate: "1974-08-12", extension: [{ url: "urn:pause-health:extension:menopause-stage", valueString: "late-perimenopause" }] } }, { fullUrl: "urn:uuid:omh-hr-20260525-001", resource: { resourceType: "Observation", id: "omh-hr-20260525-001", status: "final", meta: { source: "urn:pause-health:mulesoft:pause-ingest-process-api" }, identifier: [{ system: "urn:openmhealth:header:uuid", value: "omh-hr-20260525-001" }], category: [{ coding: [{ system: "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", code: "vital-signs", display: "Vital Signs" }] }], code: { coding: [{ system: "http://loinc.org", code: "8867-4", display: "Heart rate" }] }, subject: { reference: "Patient/pause-demo-patient-001" }, effectiveDateTime: "2026-05-25T07:30:00Z", valueQuantity: { value: 72, unit: "/min", system: "http://unitsofmeasure.org", code: "/min" }, device: { display: "Oura Ring Gen3" }, extension: [{ url: "urn:pause-health:extension:mulesoft-pipeline-version", valueString: "pause-ingest-process-api@1.0" }] } }, { fullUrl: "urn:uuid:omh-hrv-20260525-001", resource: { resourceType: "Observation", id: "omh-hrv-20260525-001", status: "final", meta: { source: "urn:pause-health:mulesoft:pause-ingest-process-api" }, identifier: [{ system: "urn:openmhealth:header:uuid", value: "omh-hrv-20260525-001" }], category: [{ coding: [{ system: "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", code: "vital-signs", display: "Vital Signs" }] }], code: { coding: [{ system: "http://loinc.org", code: "80404-7", display: "R-R interval by EKG" }] }, subject: { reference: "Patient/pause-demo-patient-001" }, effectivePeriod: { start: "2026-05-25T02:00:00Z", end: "2026-05-25T02:03:00Z" }, valueQuantity: { value: 18.4, unit: "ms", system: "http://unitsofmeasure.org", code: "ms" }, device: { display: "Oura Ring Gen3" }, extension: [{ url: "urn:pause-health:extension:mulesoft-pipeline-version", valueString: "pause-ingest-process-api@1.0" }] } }, { fullUrl: "urn:uuid:omh-sleep-20260525-001", resource: { resourceType: "Observation", id: "omh-sleep-20260525-001", status: "final", meta: { source: "urn:pause-health:mulesoft:pause-ingest-process-api" }, identifier: [{ system: "urn:openmhealth:header:uuid", value: "omh-sleep-20260525-001" }], category: [{ coding: [{ system: "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", code: "survey", display: "Survey" }] }], code: { coding: [{ system: "http://loinc.org", code: "93832-4", display: "Sleep duration" }] }, subject: { reference: "Patient/pause-demo-patient-001" }, effectivePeriod: { start: "2026-05-24T23:10:00Z", end: "2026-05-25T06:11:00Z" }, valueQuantity: { value: 421, unit: "min", system: "http://unitsofmeasure.org", code: "min" }, device: { display: "Oura Ring Gen3" }, extension: [{ url: "urn:pause-health:extension:mulesoft-pipeline-version", valueString: "pause-ingest-process-api@1.0" }] } } ] }
